atom.definition: the smallest part of an element that is still that element

grundamne.definition: a substance made of only one kind of atom

atomkarna.definition: the central part of the atom where protons and neutrons are found

proton.definition: a positively charged particle in the atomic nucleus

neutron.definition: an uncharged particle in the atomic nucleus

elektron.definition: a negatively charged particle around the nucleus

atomnummer.definition: the number of protons in the nucleus

masstal.definition: the total number of protons and neutrons in the nucleus

elektronskal.definition: a region around the nucleus where electrons are found

valenselektron.definition: an electron in the outermost shell of an atom

periodiska_systemet.definition: a table where elements are arranged by atomic number and properties

period.definition: a horizontal row in the periodic table

grupp.definition: a vertical column in the periodic table

metall.definition: a substance that often conducts heat and electricity and can be shaped

icke_metall.definition: a substance that does not have the typical properties of metals

alkalimetall.definition: an element in group 1 that readily gives away one electron

halogen.definition: an element in group 17 that readily takes up one electron

adelgas.definition: an element in group 18 with a full outer electron shell

kemisk_bindning.definition: the force that holds atoms or ions together

jonbindning.definition: a bond between positive and negative ions

kovalent_bindning.definition: a bond where atoms share electron pairs

metallbindning.definition: a bond in metals where electrons can move between atoms

jon.definition: an atom or particle with an electric charge

positiv_jon.definition: an ion with a positive charge

negativ_jon.definition: an ion with a negative charge

salt.definition: a substance made of positive and negative ions

formelenhet.definition: the smallest whole-number ratio of ions in a salt

laddningsbalans.definition: when the total positive and negative charges add up to zero

fallning.definition: a solid substance formed when ions in solution react

silvernitrat.definition: a substance used to detect certain halide ions

bariumjon.definition: a positive ion that can be used to detect sulfate ions

salpetersyra.definition: an acid used in ion testing to distinguish certain reactions
